last_session_summary: Built motivated-seller lead pipeline: leads/run.py (demo CLI), leads/fetch.py (ATTOM + mock data), leads/export.py (CSV), leads/mailer.py (SMTP), leads/pipeline.py (daily runner), .github/workflows/daily-leads.yml (cron). Demo tested: 10 leads in 1.2s, clean CSV. Registry updated with lead-gen-pipeline project.
next_steps: Get ATTOM_API_KEY from https://api.attomdata.com and add as GitHub secret for live data
Add first real paying client JSON to leads/clients/ after closing first deal
Register kickback endpoint URLs via: bash agent/register-kickback.sh <name> <url>
